programme.desc: 'S3/E15 - Fashion Show'. When Mr Sheffield rushes Fran out the door to a premier before she can get a matching handbag, she ends up on a magazine's fashion mistake list.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: 'S3/E18 - Val's Boyfriend'. Val's new boyfriend makes an unexpected pass at Fran. CC quits after Maxwell refuses to make her a partner.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Total Face Rejuvenation'. Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure that leaves both their jaws on the floor, and then at a party store, Michael reveals a regenerating piece of gum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: 'S3/E27 - The Permanent Punishment'. The guys tough it out as security guards in a drug store, go balloon for balloon in a supermarket and get inked in a special three-way punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: 'S3/E28 - Parks & Wreck'. The guys get hung out to dry while poolside at a hotel. Then they ask for writing help from strangers in a coffee shop.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: 'S3/E29 - A Legendary Fail'. The Jokers are dishing out the ultimate embarrassments! Watch them break the rules as stadium security guards, be mortified as forensic experts and get dubbed the wrong way.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S8/E11 - The Clean Room Infiltration'. Golden Globe-winning comedy that follows the adventures of a group of socially awkward scientists. Amy throws an authentic Victorian Christmas party and forces a reluctant Sheldon to join in.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S10/E12 - The Holiday Summation'. After a holiday, Sheldon (Golden Globe winner Jim Parsons) and Amy share details about all that happened on their trip to Texas. This Emmy-winning sitcom follows a group of oddball scientists.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - The Justice League Recombination'. The guys get Zack and Penny to join their 'Justice League' costume for a New Year's Eve bash at the comic-book store.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S6/E15 - The Spoiler Alert Segmentation'. A fight between Leonard and Sheldon finally drives Leonard to move in with Penny, causing unexpected trouble for both Penny and Amy. Raj takes care of Mrs Wolowitz while Howard is away.

programme.title: Two And A Half Men
programme.desc: 'S3/E18 - The Spit-Covered Cobbler'. The competing demands of Judith and Kandi leave Alan in dire financial straits.

programme.title: Two And A Half Men
programme.desc: 'S3/E19 - Golly Moses, She's a Muffin'. Charlie is surprised to find out that Kandi has been living with them for the last three weeks.

programme.title: Two And A Half Men
programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro'. Charlie starts sleeping with Kandi's mother and Judith gets set up with Kandi's father.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - The Lizard-Spock Expansion'. Wolowitz has once again used his 'dating skills' to make a mess when he invites a girl, Stephanie, to drive the Mars Rover, only to get it stuck in a ditch.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - The Vartabedian Conundrum'. Leonard just can't say no. When his relationship with new girlfriend, Stephanie starts moving too fast, Leonard turns to Penny for advice.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - The Bath Item Gift Hypothesis'. Leonard's handsome colleague dates Penny. Sheldon feels that Christmas is an annoying holiday during which a recipient of a gift is bound to a promise to give the sender a gift in return.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - The Killer Robot Instability'. When Penny's comment about Wolowitz's love life sends him into depression, his friends lose their most important teammate in an upcoming fighting robot competition.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - The Financial Permeability'. Sheldon's 'simple' solution to Penny's financial problem leads to a confrontation between Leonard and Penny's hulking ex-boyfriend, Kurt.

programme.desc: 'Comedy Central Live At The Savanna Comedy Bar. S3/E1'. Tonight's episode will be recorded in the city of Bloemfontein in the Free State Province, with headliner Robby Collins and an Open Mic featuring Thabiso Mhlongo.

programme.title: Comedy Central Live At The Savanna...

programme.title: Just For Laughs Gags
programme.desc: 'S18/E19'. There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Adam Gets Neighbourly'. Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbours' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck dinner.

programme.title: Man With A Plan

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Ice Cold Murder'. The story of the violent death of Christy Mirack, the dedicated investigation into her murder and how, after 27 years, DNA and the Bloodline Detectives brought her killer to justice.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - The Murder Of Cathy Marlow'. When Cathy Marlow's body was discovered at her office, Detectives shut down the whole office block to scour every inch for clues to find her murderer.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Down By The Lake'. Kelly and Johnny Bonds answer the call of a grieving mother, whose 19-year-old son drowned while camping with friends. While the medical examiner ruled it an accident, some suspect foul play.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Danger At Dawn'. Kelly and Abbey Abbondandolo investigate the murder of a fun-loving Texas country boy shot in the back of his head. Could it be the result of a love triangle gone tragically wrong?

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Douglas Perry'. In 1990, a man named Douglas Perry kills three women. By the time authorities track Perry down, more than two decades later, Douglas has become Donna.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Nursing Home Nightmare'. When 12 patients die over the course of 13 days at a nursing home in Florida, investigators discover a dangerous nurse.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Widow'. Kelly and Tonya Rider investigate the tragic stabbing death of an elderly woman in her own home just one week after she buried her husband.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - If I Can't Have You, No One Can'. Kelly and her team tackle one of their most emotional cases - the murder of a beautiful college student killed in her bedroom while packing for a trip to visit her parents for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Cabin In The Woods'. Kelly and Steve Spingola take on a case in Wisconsin and must navigate a tangled family tree of witnesses and suspects to find the killer of a loving husband shot in his cabin.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Dying Declaration'. Kelly and Steve Spingola head to Flint, Michigan to investigate the brazen 1991 shooting of a beloved woman murdered right outside her home.

programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Murder And The Sex Cam Model'. Margaret and Chad Amato are found dead with their youngest son in their Florida Home, middle son Grant Amato is accused of killing his family, despite a seeming lack of evidence.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - The Untraceable Scent'. On a freezing January morning, when 39 year old day-care owner Anndrea goes missing, her fiancé finds her wallet, keys and phone still in the house they share.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Out Of The Darkness'. Kathy Blair's body is found stabbed to death in her bedroom in Austin, Texas. The crime scene puzzles investigators until an unlikely clue captured in the darkness puts them on the trail of a killer.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Pattern Of Violence'. The murder of a college student in Vincennes, Indiana, may go unsolved until a second crime puts detectives on the heels of a serial killer. Police turn to the killer's pattern of violence for clues.

programme.title: A Lie To Die For
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - A Partnership Of Lies'. A young entrepreneur decides to travel the world. After months of strange emails and unreturned phone calls, his family dig into his whereabouts. What they find is shocking.

programme.title: A Lie To Die For
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - The Imperfect Couple'. When a husband's dirty secrets are threatened to be revealed, a picture-perfect marriage comes to a tragic end.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Lewis And Machuca'. In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released To Kill
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Ian McLoughlin'. A man is stabbed while helping a neighbour who's being burgled, and he tragically bleeds to death. The killer is murderer Ian McLoughlin, out on day release from prison.

programme.title: Murder In The Outback: The Falconio...
programme.desc: 'Murder In The Outback: The Falconio And Lees Mystery. S1/E1'. Andrew Fraser, formerly one of Australia's foremost criminal defence lawyers, begins the reinvestigation into the Peter Falconio story.

programme.title: Murder In The Outback: The Falconio...
programme.desc: 'Murder In The Outback: The Falconio And Lees Mystery. S1/E2'. A look at how sole eyewitness Joanne Lees came under immense scrutiny and pressure from both the British and Australian press as they hounded her for an interview.

programme.title: Twisted Killers
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Shotgun Killer'. In Columbia, South Carolina, a delusional young man is gunning down locals in cold blood with a 12-gauge shotgun. He leads detectives on a chase across state lines all the way to Texas.

programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - The Pizza Delivery Murder'. 25-year-old Ashley Biggs, a single mum and pizza delivery driver, was murdered on a late-night run for Dominos. Police arrested her former boyfriend Chad Cobb.

programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - The Pizza Delivery Murder'. 25-year-old Ashley Biggs, a single mum and pizza delivery driver, was murdered on a late-night run for Dominos. Police arrested her former boyfriend Chad Cobb.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Lewis And Machuca'. In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Brileys'. Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released To Kill
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Ian McLoughlin'. A man is stabbed while helping a neighbour who's being burgled, and he tragically bleeds to death. The killer is murderer Ian McLoughlin, out on day release from prison.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Small Town Secrets'. Kelly and Steve Spingola head to Wisconsin to investigate an unsolved homicide. Their search uncovers a town's dark side, crimes against children and lies within a church.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Professor's End'. Kelly and Tonya Rider investigate the strange death of a retired college professor in Tonya's home town, whose cremation was halted by an anonymous tip call, hinting at murder.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Holding Onto Hope'. Kelly and Johnny Bonds return to their home state of Texas to look into the disappearance of a young mother in 2000, whose family has never given up on her.

programme.title: Cold Justice
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Danger At Dawn'. Kelly and Abbey Abbondandolo investigate the murder of a fun-loving Texas country boy shot in the back of his head. Could it be the result of a love triangle gone tragically wrong?

programme.title: Killer Cases
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Murder On The Panhandle'. The vicious murder of 33-year-old nurse Melissa Howard remained unsolved for 10 years until modern forensics lead detectives to the DNA of her ex-husband's best friend, Russell Holbrook.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - A Deal With The Devil'. Investigators in Prince George's County, Maryland are chasing a killer targeting mothers and daughters. The investigation leads them to a predator, unlike anything they've encountered before.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Hidden In Plain Sight'. When a woman is found murdered in her kitchen, police in Chicopee, Massachusetts have no shortage of suspects. Detectives realise the clue that leads to her killer is actually hidden in plain sight.

programme.title: One Deadly Mistake

programme.title: A Lie To Die For

programme.title: A Lie To Die For

programme.title: Murder In The Outback: The Falconio...

programme.title: Twisted Killers

programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Monkey Business/ Tech Trouble'. Boo's emotions get the best of him when he loses his favorite stuffed animal. When Coop plans to use an old smartphone as a new tool, Tully thinks her old school methods are best.

programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Troll Trouble!/ The Sunny Gulch Games!'. King Ludwig of Majestica needs Mickey, Minnie, and friends' help with a grumpy troll! Daisy's promise to follow the rules is tested when she competes in The Sunny Gulch Games.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Treehouse Trouble/ the Getaway Car That Got Away'. Bo suggests the Firebuds build a treehouse in his backyard. Piston accidentally releases a notorious getaway car.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E31 - Work'. In a game of Work, Bluey and Bingo are the latest hires at Dad's drainpipe factory.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E32 - Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound'. Bluey sends a video to Bingo in hospital to show her that everyone gets sick sometimes.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E33 - Trampoline'. Dad can't go to work until he has played all of Bluey and Bingo's trampoline games

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E34 - The Dump'. On a car trip to the dump, Bluey discovers that Dad is throwing out her old drawings.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Rosa needs some sights and creatures for her mural of Wonderland! We head to the palace courtroom as the Queen puts jumbleberries, a banished food, on trial!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E125 - Moon Marooned / Newton and the Star Splat'. After not listening to the warnings, Pirate Robot gets himself and Newton captured. Newton creates a powerful Star Splat.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E126 - Trick or Treat/ Trick or Treat Part 2'. Orticia gets carried away by tricking, not treating - resulting in mild Halloween horror.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E127 - Newton's Discovery / Romeo's Pirate Trap'. Newton's powers have been neutralized because of Romeo's blockade of the asteroids. Pirate Robot wants to upgrade his ship.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E129 - Heroes of the Road/ Heroes of the Road Part 2'. The PJ Masks can't wait to use their PJ Vehicles against Carly and Cartoka. But as a result, they don't work well with Newton or their PJ Animals.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Going Green'. Team Spidey is planting trees in the park, but Green Goblin interrupts by spewing gas everywhere. Peter uses his new invention to clean up a mess.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Eureka is resolved to turn her new invention into 'a swing that pushes itself.' Barry's drumming idol, Yurt, comes to town and he is determined to impress her.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E13'. The Queen and Dad Hatter split up their party after a spat. Alice reminds them they're better together! Alice helps Fergie plan a surprise party for JoJo the dodo chick.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Is There a Plumber in the House?!'. Mickey is excited to read his new book, but can't because he is supposed to attend the Faire. King Ludwig leaves Mickey in charge of Majestica while he goes out of town.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Sleepover Stakeout/ Rescue Club'. Jayden plans a sleepover stakeout to catch the thief of his new invention. Carly wants to join the school's Rescue Club, even though she's not a rescue vehicle like the Firebuds.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - No Palace Like Home / a Royal Remembrance'. At Rosa's sleepover, Hattie frets as his bedtime routine changes! When Rosa and Alice create a dish for Abuelo, everything goes wrong.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. When the Queen misses a crucial step in baking, Alice saves the day! The Queen and Rosa are whisked away on a trip and ask Alice to care for their pet, Jabbie.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Cookie's Day Off / Picture Furfect'. When Cookie's beach trip is cancelled due to weather, Alice brings the beach to her! Fergie's upset he couldn't stay pristine for his family picture so Alice cheers him up.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E121 - Rain'. When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E122 - Pizza Girls'. Bluey and Bingo are making mud pizzas and delivering them to the grownups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E123 - Driving'. With only five minutes to play 'Driving,' Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E124 - Tina'. Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E125 - Whale Watching'. Bluey promises her customer Bingo 'the best tour ever' in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E126 - Faceytalk'. Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the 80s and about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Treehouse Trouble/ the Getaway Car That Got Away'. Bo suggests the Firebuds build a treehouse in his backyard. Piston accidentally releases a notorious getaway car.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E96 - Teeny Weeny Returns/Robo-Wolf'. Feeling bad about his ninja past, Teeny Weeny tries to help defeat the ninjas using his monster powers. The Wolfies want their own robo-servant, but get more than they wish for!

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery

programme.desc: 'S22/E1 of 4 - Nicolas Colsaerts'. A focus on DP World Tour stars, as we gain an insight into where they come from, what their life was like growing up and how they got to where they are today.

programme.title: Golf Feature
programme.desc: 'S22/E56 of 61'. The South African Disabled Golf Association recently held their annual Cape Town Open, which then was followed by a trip to Dubai to collect some golf balls all courtesy of the DP World Tour.

programme.title: PGA HL 22/23 World Challenge D3
programme.desc: 'PGA Tour Highlights - Hero World Challenge Day 3'. From Albany - New Providence, Bahamas.

programme.title: Sunshine HL '22 South African Open D4

programme.title: PGA 22/23 World Challenge D4
programme.desc: 'PGA Tour - Hero World Challenge Day 4'. LIVE From Albany - New Providence, Bahamas.

programme.title: Comfort In Affliction
programme.desc: Imagine a pit - a place where there was no life-supporting materials. He was in complete want of everything. Learn how Joseph, despite all odds, found comfort in affliction in this uplifting message by TB Joshua.

programme.title: Acknowledge God
programme.desc: John 6:63 tells us that the Spirit gives life, the flesh counts for nothing. Therefore, we must advance in the things of the Spirit in order to live as God intended us to. We can only do so through a lifestyle of acknowledging Him.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: A Time Of Prayer
programme.desc: Position yourself to receive, as you pray along with TB Joshua, in this special time of prayer.

programme.title: Standard For Life
programme.desc: Christ and His Word are inseparable! Get connected to God's Word and God's Spirit as you listen to this life transforming message live and direct from The SCOAN.

programme.desc: Imagine a pit - a place where there was no life-supporting materials. He was in complete want of everything. Learn how Joseph, despite all odds, found comfort in affliction in this uplifting message by TB Joshua.

programme.title: Nazareth Crusade Day 1
programme.desc: Aptly set, The Nazareth Meeting With TB Joshua Day 1 was held on the historic Mount Precipice, where Jesus once walked. A message centred on love freed hearts to receive the blessings that followed.

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.desc: Many Christians often wonder why their prayer and Christian activities seem to yield little or no result. Prophet T.B. Joshua reveals the secret of attracting the Spirit of God to our lives in the message, A Free Spirit.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Russia Snow Village
programme.desc: Those weathered by the hardships of life are in need at the Russia Snow Village. The Emmanuel TV team visits the charity to further assist with food and clothes to fuel and warm them through the winter season.

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.desc: Many Christians often wonder why their prayer and Christian activities seem to yield little or no result. Prophet T.B. Joshua reveals the secret of attracting the Spirit of God to our lives in the message, A Free Spirit.

programme.title: Live Sunday Service
programme.desc: Join Prophet TB Joshua in a time of powerful prayer, revealing prophecy and incredible deliverance during the Saturday Live Prophetic Service at The SCOAN. As you watch God's power at work, trust in Him that your life will improve.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Martin explores the legendary Galapagos, getting up close to sealions, iguanas, tortoises, penguins, finches and baby sharks. He joins conservation expeditions, sees evolution in action and visits the site of a murder mystery.

programme.title: Cornwall With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Simon investigates the environmental challenges facing Cornwall and the rest of the country, and on the way encounters some of its iconic wildlife, including Britain's largest predator, the huge grey seal.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - India'. Ben retraces his epic journey back to India to revisit Steve Lall, an ex-fighter pilot who turned his back on Indian High Society for a simple life in the foothills of the Himalayas.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Best Laid Plans'. Kim and Pierre's trapline expansion is well underway when a troublesome local resident threatens to derail their plans.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Ford Class Aircraft Carrier'. In this episode we learn about the construction of the cutting-edge Ford class aircraft carriers, the largest warships ever built - almost as long as the Empire State Building is tall.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean:...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean: Havana To Haiti. S1/E2 of 2 - Haiti'. Before leaving Cuba, Joanna gets as close as possible to Guantanamo Bay, before taking a short boat trip to Haiti.

programme.title: Got Science?
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Inside Your Body'. We reveal how different parts of our body are constantly and silently at work all the time and capable of amazing things. The stories highlight this superior machine in all its glory.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. Steve Backshall and his team travel to Saudi Arabia to explore rock formations and underground lava caves.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Steve and the team head to remotest Kyrgyzstan in search of snow leopards - if the team can find evidence of the endangered big cat, they could protect the region.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E6 - Bone Cold'. The Hailstones brave the freeze to seek new land for the expanding family. Sue Aikens must replenish her resources in Chena to survive the brutal cold.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E8 - Bloodlines'. Chip and Carol Hailstone combat brutal conditions on a critical hunt to replenish the family's food supply. Sue Aikens utilizes her time in Chena to upkeep and maintain the property's structures.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E9 - Bare Bones'. The Hailstones isolate at their camp in Kiwalik to seize seasonal harvests. Sue Aikens must scour the tundra to secure food to survive.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E10 - The Big Catch'. Ricko DeWilde teaches his children to survive in the wild as they journey to Huslia. Sue Aikens updates her camp to improve her comfort.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Southern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores Catholic island life and whether the physical aspect of the landscape makes it easier to make spiritual connections.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. A film following a young meerkat queen living in the harsh beauty of the Makgadikgadi salt pans.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. A mother puma must battle rivals, tackle prey nearly three times her size and endure the wild mountain weather of Patagonia in her bid to raise four cubs - her biggest litter yet.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. In Amboseli, Kenya, an incredibly rare event pushes a struggling elephant family to its limits. To save their dynasty, they have to work together and overcome the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Animals with Cameras
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Oceans'. Wildlife cameraman, Gordon Buchanan leads a team using specially designed on board cameras to film ground-breaking new behaviour in some of the animals who depend on our oceans.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E3 - Clean Our Air'. Led by Prince William, with Sir David Attenborough and Japanese astronaut Naoko Yamazaki, we hear personal stories of people who are directly affected by air pollution.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Extreme volcanologist adrenaline junkie Christopher Horsley, a volcano access specialist, photographer and expedition guide, sets out to explore the most active lava volcanoes on Planet Earth.

programme.title: Coast Australia
programme.desc: 'S4/E5'. Exploring the history, geography and marine life of the Australia's stunning coastline.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Martin explores the legendary Galapagos, getting up close to sealions, iguanas, tortoises, penguins, finches and baby sharks. He joins conservation expeditions, sees evolution in action and visits the site of a murder mystery.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alexander witnesses a volcanic eruption, visits the original geyser, learns about the Icelandic belief in elves, takes a trip to an unusual museum and meets an Icelandic rock band.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E3 - Clean Our Air'. Led by Prince William, with Sir David Attenborough and Japanese astronaut Naoko Yamazaki, we hear personal stories of people who are directly affected by air pollution.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E13'. A daring Swedish skier captures the horrifying moment he is buried alive by a tsunami of snow in Verbier, Switzerland. In California, blazing bushfires tear through communities.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Wales'. Ben heads back to Utah, where he first met twin brothers Bill and Bob Stone, 3 years ago. He re-joins these canyon-dwelling renegades in their remote home, but this time, only one of them is living there.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Hungary'. Ben returns to the remote Hungarian countryside to revisit Julia Pryke and Gareth Shone who just 16 months ago gave up the 9 - 5 in the UK to live in a ramshackle farmhouse in a country they had never visited.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Texas'. Ben ventures back to the barren landscape of the Wild West to revisit one of his first ever wild men John Wells, a former fashion photographer who gave up the New York City high life for the scorching Texan desert.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of the World. S1/E1'. Joanna Lumley is on an adventure to three of the world's greatest cities - Berlin, Paris and Rome.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of the World. S1/E2'. Joanna continues her travels to Rome, a city like no other on earth. She zips into the city on the back of a Vespa to get her first glimpse of the beauty that awaits.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Great Cities of the World. S1/E3'. Joanna continues her travels to Berlin. A sometimes dark history has given birth to a creative city with a thrilling atmosphere.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean:...
programme.desc: 'Joanna Lumley's Hidden Caribbean: Havana To Haiti. S1/E1 of 2 - Havana'. Joanna kicks off her adventure in the back of a classic car in Havana, outlining her 1500-mile Caribbean adventure.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. On Zambia's plains, a cheetah mother must keep her precious cubs safe, preparing them for life without her.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. With the emergence of a young rival, a spotted hyena queen struggles to keep her grip on power - while also trying to raise a family - on Zambia's vast and unforgiving Liuwa Plain grasslands.

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. High in the mountains of Morocco lives a descendant of a long line of macaque rulers who has been in charge of her troupe for many winters.

programme.title: Inside The Factory

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Southern Outer Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores Catholic island life and whether the physical aspect of the landscape makes it easier to make spiritual connections.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Alexander Armstrong continues his journey around Iceland where he samples the local delicacy of rotten shark, takes a whale watching trip, plays golf at midnight and sings in a farmers' choir.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Volcano expert Chris Horsley is still in Iceland to check out Katla, one of Europe's largest and most deadly volcanos, which is overdue an eruption.

programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E4 - Revive Our Oceans'. Prince William and Earthshot Prize Council members Sir David Attenborough and singer Shakira discover how we are damaging the oceans.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S10/E4 - Lunar New Year'. Molly Yeh celebrates the Lunar New Year with a Chinese-inspired feast. The tasty menu includes orange chicken, peanut buttery pork noodles and egg rolls.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S10/E3 - Let's Get Cozy!'. Molly Yeh is making hearty foods to keep her family warm. They include comforting chicken and dumpling soup with decadent no knead salami bread.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S22/E11 - Indulgent Dishes'. This trip Guy is indulging in some rich recipes. He has a glorious gumbo and a spicy mahi mahi speciality, and then some luscious lamb ragout.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S14/E2 - Grill Masters'. Four of America's most accomplished grill masters compete to win $20,000. They must play grocery golf and grill the perfect steak to have a chance at winning!

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Turkey Day Delights'. The seven remaining bakers make a dessert fusing cranberry and a seasonal flavour. And, they create a sweet treat that pairs coffee with an unusual coffee syrup.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S48/E9 - Battle Of The Meats: Bison'. This fierce battle features a lean protein: bison! The first round sees the chefs going in distinct directions with their jellybean and rib appetisers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 - Mauritius'. From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavourful fusions of Mauritius.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S8/E13 - Parents' Payback'. Molly Yeh makes dinner for her in-laws to say thanks for all their help. The menu includes her knoephla sausage hotdish and buttery kitty cookies for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S9/E2 - Wheat And Meat Tailgate'. Molly Yeh celebrates wheat harvest on the farm. She makes sheet pan ratatouille pizza, succulent grilled ribeye steak and tangy rhubarb bars for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S9/E4 - Farm-iversary'. Molly Yeh celebrates eight happy years of Midwestern farm life with all her cosy food favourites. Delicious dishes include chewy tahini caramel rolls.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S9/E5 - Halloween Brunch Club'. Molly Yeh hosts a Halloween-themed brunch with frighteningly good food. The spooky menu includes cyclops shakshuka focaccias and matcha macaroon monsters!

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S9/E6 - Turtle River Hike'. Molly Yeh's day starts with a blueberry toasted oat tart. She then shares a picnic of bacon, lettuce and fried green tomato sandwiches and ranch egg salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S9/E7 - Nick's Birthday Dinner Roast'. Molly Yeh celebrates her husband's birthday with a friendly roast and an Italian-inspired meal. She makes a fried olive salad and red velvet cake.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S9/E8 - Thanksgiving Parade'. Molly Yeh celebrates Thanksgiving with a tiny parade on the farm. On the menu are crispy fried turkey breasts and tahini cinnamon sweet potatoes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Puppet Circus'. Molly organizes a puppet circus on the farm with accompanying food. She bakes creamy roasted butternut squash shells & cheese and mint clown cones for dessert.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Holiday Party Delights'. Nine bakers must create eye-catching and tantalising holiday treats for seasonal parties. They then use a holiday cocktail as sweet inspiration.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - Season Of Sharing'. Eight bakers team up to make a dozen hand pies in a festive holiday shape. Then they create a dessert duo inspired by classic holiday flavour combinations.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Thanksgiving Genius'. The seven remaining bakers must create a Thanksgiving dessert using a mystery canned fruit. Then they make a new dish by combining two traditional desserts.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - A New Holiday Spin'. The six remaining bakers create new takes on traditional holiday baking. Inspired by an internet baking meme, they use yellow cake mix to make anything but cake.

programme.title: Triple D Nation: Chili Three Ways
programme.desc: Guy Fieri crosses the border to Vancouver, BC, to see if a Chinese joint's chicken dish is as spicy as it sounds. Plus, he heads south to sample brisket chili in Atlanta.

programme.title: Triple D Nation: Burgers, Burritos...
programme.desc: 'Triple D Nation: Burgers, Burritos And Biscuits'. Guy Fieri's checking out all kinds of food. In Boulder City, a chili-churning diner is keeping it in the family, and a taqueria in Salt Lake City is cranking out huge burritos.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Pittsburgh'. Andrew explores the favourite foods of Pittsburgh - home to a half-pound fish sandwich, as well as hearty recipes like kielbasa, stuffed cabbage and pierogi.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship:...
programme.desc: 'Holiday Baking Championship: Gingerbread. S1/E1 - Hangin' With My Gnomies'. Three teams of bakers create a gingerbread scene depicting gnomes hangin' for the holidays and make an accompanying cardamom dessert.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E7 - Freshen Up Your Favorites'. The gang stirs up weeknight favourites like meat and potatoes, pasta and chicken and rice. And, there's taco night takeover with a taco skillet bake.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E8 - Supper In A Snap'. The gang throws together some quick and easy dishes that are perfect for those with a busy schedule. On the menu is pasta bake, curried shrimp and corn chowder.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E9 - Perfect Plate Of Fall'. The gang serves up a plate of Fall favourites. The menu includes brown butter sage butternut squash bake and a crispy Asian brussels sprouts salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E9 - Perfect Plate Of Fall'. The gang serves up a plate of Fall favourites. The menu includes brown butter sage butternut squash bake and a crispy Asian brussels sprouts salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E10 - Breakfast Of Champions'. The gang serve up breakfast feasts. On the menu are a slow cooker hash brown casserole and a crispy buttermilk popcorn chicken and waffle bowl.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Holiday Spirit'. Molly makes a festive buffet and edible gifts for three generations of her family. On the menu are pastrami meatballs, Brussels sprouts latkes and marzipan treats.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Apple Harvest'. Molly Yeh makes the ultimate campfire supper for her blogging friends. Dishes include fried cheesy pickles and a butternut, bacon and apple hotdish.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Mom On The Farm'. Molly Yeh makes a supper of her mum's favourite dishes. On the menu are chicken paprikash, with sides of spatzle and zucchini with walnut pesto.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Ladies Who Brunch'. Molly Yeh makes a delicious brunch feast for her friends. Dishes include mini kale shakshuka, sweet potato and bacon hash, and baked challah French toast.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Pizza Friday'. It's Pizza Friday on the farm! Molly makes two pizzas with one dough recipe: sausage & kale and squash & ricotta. And, there's a chocolate chip cookie cake for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Pantry Faves'. Molly Yeh uses pantry ingredients in a budget lunch. She makes harissa-braised chickpeas with feta, yogurt marinated chicken skewers and peanut butter rice squares.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Chinese New Year'. Molly Yeh makes a special menu for Chinese New Year. Dishes include ginger glazed salmon, carrot steamed buns, peanut butter broccolini and fortune cookies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Big Game'. Molly Yeh makes a pre-game lunch for friends, and it's full of delicious finger foods! She serves her Asian Scotch eggs and crispy oven fries with feta red pepper dip.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Birthday Boys'. Molly Yeh makes a birthday lunch menu for her husband and father-in-law. The menu features chicken shawarma tacos, Moroccan carrot salad and chocolate tahini cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - Asheville'. Andrew Zimmern reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. This includes tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, and succulent rainbow trout.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S37/E3 - Luck Of The Irish'. The chefs must create dishes using mystery treats from Ireland. Ingredients include an iconic stout, an Irish delicacy and a favourite Irish ice cream treat.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S37/E4 - Beer And Brats'. The chefs take part in a Bavarian bash, starting with an appetizer basket that includes potato chips. The final two competitors must work with beers and brats.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S37/E5 - Hush Puppy Love'. The competitors take on Southern classics like hush puppies and black-eyed peas. Then fruity, creamy and doughy desserts feature in the final round.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - Asheville'. Andrew Zimmern reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. This includes tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, and succulent rainbow trout.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Savannah'. Andrew Zimmern dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, and upscale crab bisque.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E12 - Amman'. Andrew samples some of the dishes of Amman, Jordan, such as multi-tiered towers of goat and veggies, sumac-coated chicken with onions and lamb cooked in creamy yogurt sauce.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E13 - Mumbai'. Andrew explores edible icons of Mumbai, including deep-fried fish and prawns, saucy goat over rice and vegetarian dishes from puffed rice salad to spicy potato mashups.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E14 - Hyderabad'. Andrew Zimmern explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad. He samples savoury potato pastries, silver-garnished syrupy fried bread and hearty meals of meat and rice.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E15 - Panama City'. Andrew Zimmern uncovers Panama City's classic tastes inspired by its blended cultures. They include fried whole fish and plantains and citric ceviche and yucca fritters.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E12 - One-Pan Crowd Pleasers'. Ree cooks up her favourite one-pan crowd pleasers for Christmas! She makes easy Tex-Mex chicken and rice and braised short ribs and carrots to celebrate.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E13 - 4 Ways To Start The Day'. Ree Drummond shares four of her favourite ways to start the day! She starts with portable Tex-Mex egg muffins and delicious lemon poppy seed pancakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E1 - Film Crew Takeout'. Ree Drummond cooks for her kid crew after a day of filming. She makes veggie packed burritos, tortilla soup, s'mores brownies and baked BBQ ribs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E2 - California Cooking'. The sun is shining, and Ree is doing some California-style cooking. She makes wine-roasted chicken with pistachio pesto pasta and vibrant cauliflower tacos.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E3 - 16-Min Meals: Cowboy Favorites'. Ree shares yummy 16-minute recipes for cowboys and cowgirls. She makes steak medallions and potatoes, and gnocchi with chorizo and corn.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E4 - 3 Apps And A Cocktail'. Ree prepares for cocktail hour with delicious dishes. They include BBQ shrimp cocktail, buffalo chicken meatball skewers and blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.title: The Gardener
programme.desc: An intense home invasion thriller. An immigrant working as a gardener at an English manor house must use his soldier skills to protect the family from invaders.

programme.title: See For Me
programme.desc: Fans of Don't Breathe will enjoy this home invasion thriller. A young blind woman must turn to technology when house-sitting becomes a matter of life or death.

programme.title: Remote Danger
programme.desc: In this thriller, a pregnant woman and her husband go on a remote counselling retreat. When they engage in intense bonding tasks, she begins to question her counsellor's motives.

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard: Poisoned In...
programme.desc: 'Martha's Vineyard: Poisoned In Paradise'. The fourth entry in the mystery franchise. Jeff and Zee look into the death of a waitress who had sought Jeff's help before her death.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: The brilliant British comic duo of Simon Pegg and Nick Frost are back - this time taking on the buddy cop genre as a by-the-book cop suspects a sinister conspiracy in a small town.

programme.title: The Losers
programme.desc: Based on the popular comic book series, this action film starring an all-star cast sees an elite Special Forces Unit seek revenge after they are double-crossed on a mission.

programme.title: The Kick
programme.desc: A treat for martial arts fans. A family hailed as heroes for foiling a robbery of a priceless artefact find themselves the target of the gang they stopped.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: East meets West in this epic Asian fantasy film. 'Matrix' star Keanu Reeves leads a group of 47 warriors into battle against deadly mystical forces.

programme.title: Free Guy
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds takes centre stage in this larger-than-life action sci-fi movie. A bank teller discovers that he's actually an NPC inside a brutal, open-world video game.

programme.title: The Protégé
programme.desc: Maggie Q leads this all-star cast in this action movie. When the mentor of the world's best contract killer is killed, she vows to avenge the man who taught her everything.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's tale of a deadly and seemingly unstoppable man-eating shark saw this deep-sea horror win three Academy Awards and saw fans returning to watch this cult classic.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: The seventh entry in the franchise. When a zombie outbreak hits Raccoon City, a group of survivors must team up to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Morning Show Mysteries: Murder...
programme.desc: 'Morning Show Mysteries: Murder Ever After'. After finding bones in the basement of an old friend's house, Billie Blessings works with the new Head of Homicide to solve the case.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Terminal Descent
programme.desc: Crossword editor Tess and Detective Logan are faced with a new case when a tech entrepreneur is killed ahead of a crossword showdown between his supercomputer and Tess.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: The Bourne Supremacy team of Director Paul Greengrass and Oscar winner Matt Damon reunite for this action drama. A US army officer goes rogue when he discovers a conspiracy.

programme.title: Skyfire
programme.desc: In this exciting action film, humans are fighting to survive against Mother Nature. A volcano erupts unexpectedly, giving the people on Tianhuo Island very little time to evacuate.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger takes on the bad guys in this action classic when a rebel group demands an ex-commando kill a president in exchange for his daughter's life.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Yimou Zhang helms this historical fantasy starring Matt Damon. An elite force of warriors must save humanity from a horde of monstrous creatures.

programme.title: Breaking In
programme.desc: Gabrielle Union is fierce in this captivating thriller. When her two kids are taken hostage after a break-in, a mother must do everything to save them.

programme.title: Those Who Wish Me Dead
programme.desc: In this action thriller, Angelina Jolie descends into danger to save a boy who is being pursued by a deadly pair of assassins while a forest fire threatens to consume them all.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 9
programme.desc: Having escaped the clutches of Charlize Theron, Dom and the crew are now faced with the emergence of his estranged brother, played by John Cena, in this exciting ninth instalment.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: Margot Robbie, Idris Elba and John Cena propel this sequel to the 2016 film. A task force of convicted supervillains undertakes a deadly mission on the island of Corto Maltese.

programme.title: Good Sam
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Natural Order'. Dr. Sam Griffith fights to keep her new leadership role as chief of surgery when her father and former boss, Dr. Rob 'Griff' Griffith, takes his case for reinstatement directly to the hospital board.

programme.title: Power Book II: Ghost
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Fair Fight?'. Tariq's fate lies in the hands of Tate. Monet's choices feel out of her control. She must rely on Mecca to help salvage the pieces of her family.

programme.title: SEAL Team
programme.desc: 'S5/E10 - Head On'. Bravo Team is presented with a mission in South America unlike any other, while tensions surrounding Jason's leadership are at an all-time high.

programme.title: The Last O.G.
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - The Squared Circle'. Veesy convinces a Brooklyn artist to paint a mural for the community centre Tray approaches Mark Breland and Teddy Atlas to train Javi.

programme.title: MasterChef South Africa
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Mystery Hive'. Presented with an eclectic selection of ingredients, contestants struggle to hit the sweet spot. A surprise delivery adds to the buzz but leads to some confusion.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: 'S21/E5 - Free Speech'. Bernard and Cosgrove investigate the murder of a congressional candidate. ADAs Price and Maroun contend with an extremist plot hellbent on thwarting the candidate's agenda by any means necessary.

programme.title: Good Sam
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Chronic Insult'. Dr. Sam Griffith deals with the fallout following her actions at the hospital fundraising gala, and Griff returns to the OR for the first time since his shooting to perform a bypass surgery.

programme.title: The Block Australia

programme.title: The Block Australia
programme.desc: 'S15/E40 - Backyard Week'. Scotty gives the most devastating news he has ever had to deliver to a team on The Block.

programme.title: The Bachelorette
programme.desc: 'S18/E19'. Has the bachelorette found her soulmate, and will he get down on one knee?

programme.title: The Bachelorette
programme.desc: 'S18/E20'. Michelle has her final dates in beautiful Mexico, and has a life-changing decision to make. Has she found her soulmate, and will he get down on one knee?

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: 'S5/E13 - Finale'. An incredible singing competition where a group of celebrity performers wear costumes to conceal identities. One singer is eliminated each week and unmasked.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Salims/Chins'. The Pakistani-American Salim family, who met during their arranged marriage, swap homes with the Taiwanese-Cantonese Chin family to experience each other's version of the American dream.

programme.title: MasterChef South Africa
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - Humble Tomato'. Contestants elevate a kitchen staple to haute cuisine in a Relay Team Challenge that tests their communication skills as much as their culinary abilities.

programme.title: DiepCity
programme.desc: 'S2/E172 of 237'. Ringo seeks companionship from Charleston. Asanda goes back to the nyaope den, but this time it's to defend Charleston's honour.

programme.title: DiepCity

programme.title: Unfaithful
programme.desc: When a man discovers his wife knows about his infidelity but doesn't confront him about it, he starts to believe that she might also be cheating.

programme.title: Festive Get Together

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S3/E157 of 222'. Thathi is forced to say goodbye to her home. Sizwe and Zaza deny everything even as they are presented with evidence.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E19 - Chimpmania/Dad Jokes'. Jeanette and the Chipmunks break-in to Bocarter's house to rescue a chimpanzee, Alvin is alarmed that Dave will be hosting an auction where he'll have to tell jokes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E20 - The Chosen Chipmunk'. Alvin sneaks into Simon's new virtual reality game and is transported to a world in desperate need of a hero.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E21 - Last Days Of Summer'. Alvin wastes his entire summer playing a video game then tries to do all the fun things he'd planned in one day.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Slink Or Swim/The Big Chill'. After begging Abuelo for some A/C, the cousins earn some cash at the neighborhood fair, When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves!

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Karma Chameleon/Team Effort'. Ronnie Anne and her cousins look after Cam, the chameleon snake, Ronnie Anne and her skate buddies show their coach they have what it takes to make a team.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S11/E8 - Fun-Sized Friends/Grandmum's The Word'. SpongeBob can't drive, but you don't need a license to operate a self-driving car, SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Cursed!'. Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him!

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - What's Love Gato Do With It?/Dial M. For Mustard'. After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S6/E108 - Patty Caper/Plankton's Regular'. It's time to restock the secret Krabby Patty ingredient - and it is SpongeBob's duty. Later, Plankton has a customer who eats at the Chum Bucket every day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - Boating Buddies/Krabby Kronicle'. In an attempt to get away from SpongeBob, Squidward drives off in his boat - later, Mr Krabs decides to go into the tabloid business.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S9/E95 - Larry's Gym'. When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Prankaversary'. When Frida's fun dad visits, Hector tries to win back his grandchildren's attention, Ronnie Anne and Lincoln are set for a big day of pranks and newbie Sid wants to join.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E22 - Life Of The Party'. The chipmunks along with Kevin and Cheesy decide to crash BoCarter's birthday yacht party after not being invited.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E23 - Instant Gram'. Dave gets an 'Instant Gram' account and after several embarrassing posts, Alvin does all he can to stop him.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! And The Chipmunks
programme.desc: 'S4/E48 - Simon Saves The World'. Simon's new invention threatens to destroy the world, creating a time loop and changing gravity inside the house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S8/E69 - Are You Happy Now?/Planet Of The Jellyfish'. When Squidward can't recall his happiest memory, SpongeBob 'helps' him create one - later, an evil Jellien overlord replaces everyone in Bikini Bottom with clones.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S5/E91 - Goo Goo Gas / Le Big Switch'. After being enrolled in a chef exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: Middlemost Post
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - I Named It Whiskers/How Angus Got His Groove Back'. After one of Lily's inventions goes haywire, she enlists Parker's help, Angus loses his lucky beanie, which causes him to revert back to being a child.

programme.title: The Casagrandes
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Flee Market'. Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado during his pizza-versary date with Lori. Ronnie Anne notices she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents
programme.desc: 'S7 - Operation Dinkleberg/Spellementary School'. Dad sets out to prove that his kindly neighbour is evil // Foop is back, and wants to be the most popular kid at magic school.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents
programme.desc: 'S9/E11 - Cosmonopoly / Hero Hound'. Timmy, his dad, and fairies get stuck in a board game created by Cosmo. // Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic. Dad thinks he can talk to animals.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents
programme.desc: 'S9/E12 - A Boy And His Dog-Boy/Crock Blocked'. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form, Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Crocker becomes invisible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S3/E55 - The Great Snail Race / Mid-Life Crustacean'. Squidward gets a pure-bread snail and decides to race her in the snail races, Mr. Krabs feels old so he asks to join SpongeBob and Patrick on a wild night out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S3/E56 - Born Again Krabs / I Had an Accident'. Mr. Krabs gets ill after eating an old Krabby Patty, SpongeBob has an accident while sand sledding! Afraid for his safety, he won't leave his house.

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Trapped'. It's time for celebration on the ranch as Armando's wedding day approaches. Plus, Tia rushes to rescue a pit bull on the loose near a busy highway.

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - In A Pickle'. The bakers and fakers freshen up their carrot cakes with lime in round one. Then, the contestants must use pickles in their dessert to take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: 'S11/E8 - Fireworks'. Valerie is celebrating America's birthday with a sparkling menu! She makes mini bell pepper poppers with bacon, chipotle barbecue ribs, and kale and carrot slaw.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: 'S11/E9 - Bayou Bash Brunch'. Valerie invites Louisiana native and actress Faith Ford over for brunch. On the menu are fried green tomato Benedict and easy Cajun hollandaise.

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - S'more The Merrier'. The bakers are challenged with creating the campfire classic dessert - s'mores. But can they successfully incorporate the surprise ingredient, beans?!

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Corn Utopia'. The bakers must create an apple pie, using the cornucopia of corn options. How will the bakers feature the surprise ingredient in this American classic dessert?

programme.title: Pit Bulls And Parolees
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Southern Uprising'. Tia heads south after receiving a desperate call to save a starving pit bull. Plus, there is a dangerous chase to rescue an injured stray in Mississippi.

programme.title: Bakers Vs. Fakers
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - The Soy Of Baking'. The bakers must create a banana bread using a selection of soy ingredients. And, which bakers will successfully use salad dressing in their desserts?

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: 'S15/E4 - Highway Patrol'. Investigator McHugh does her best to dodge traffic trying to save a dog that's strayed onto a motorway. Later, she helps a Chihuahua with a spinal injury.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: 'S10/E13 - Kids Baking Champ Homecoming Day'. Valerie catches up with two of her favourites from Kids Baking Championship, Nyah and Matthew. She shows them how to make a kid-friendly savoury meal.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking
programme.desc: 'S11/E1 - If Mama Ain't Happy'. For Mother's Day, Valerie Bertinelli invites her friend, actress Angela Kinsey, over a decadent meal. She makes roasted cod with cashew coconut lime topping.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking

programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. McMillan says he is not a picky eater, but is he ready to be the guinea pig when his wife Boledi tries her hand at cooking chicken cables for the very first time? And will Makoti's inexperience give Mama the upper hand?

programme.title: Will He Say Yes?: Zambia
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. Olivia has been dating Gift for long enough to know she wants to be his wife, but she has waited in vain for a proposal. Will he say yes when she gets down on one knee?

programme.title: Room Reno
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. A team of experts help two frustrated housemates take on a room revamp. A coin toss decides which housemate will be in charge of the job.

programme.title: 7 Colours
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. A cooking reality competition celebrating the traditional South African Sunday feast. Two teams cook to impress celebrity judges Mam Lilian Dube and Moshe Ndiki.

programme.title: My Zambian Plate
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. We explore Zambian cuisine in this upbeat cooking show, as our chef host explores the most exciting recipes made with ingredients that are simple and accessible no matter where you are.

programme.title: Love Me or Leave Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. The couples get a reality check on their problems. They are challenged to dig deep into their relationships through role play.

programme.title: Ehe! It's A Match: Zambia
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. The battle is on when two couples cook against one another for an enviable prize. With fun, interesting themes and a menu set by their opponents, these couples bring a fun twist to being in the kitchen together.

programme.title: Sangoma, Khanyisa!
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. Mzwandile is an alcoholic and suspects someone is bewitching him. Nomalizo needs help with her family. Hosted by Penny Lebyane.

programme.title: Yes, I Have HIV: South Africa
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. People reveal their status to their close family and friends for the first time, with the support of our host who has lived with virus for decades.

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E74 - Cat Blanc'. When Marinette makes a serious mistake, she has to face the consequences by fighting the last person she ever imagined would get akumatized.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E75 - Felix'. Students Marinette and Adrien transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir, to save Paris by capturing evil creatures, Akumas, which transform people into villains.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E76 - Ladybug'. Students Marinette and Adrien transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir, to save Paris by capturing evil creatures, Akumas, which transform people into villains.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E77 - The Battle of the Miraculous - Part One: Loveater'. Ladybug and Cat Noir face the Bourgeois couple. Now Hearthunter, a Cerberus with two heads, they devour all the love in Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E78 - The Battle of the Miraculous: Miracle Queen Part 2'. Hawk Moth akumatizes Chloe into Miracle Queen to make her take control of all the Miraculous holders.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E79 - Truth'. A friend of Marinette's gets akumatized into Truth. Using his power to force people to tell the truth, he wants to know Marinette's secret...and Ladybug and Cat Noir's, too!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E80 - Lies'. A friend of Adrien's get akumatized into Lies. Able to make liars disappear, she is determined to rid the world of lies and those who tell them...including superheroes!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E81 - Gang of Secrets'. Marinette's friends get akumatized into the Gang of Secrets, a team of supervillains determined to save her...whether she wants it or not!

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S2/E21 - Pair of Sneakers'. Mal and Freddie sneak back onto the Isle of the Lost in hopes of finding Mal's missing Jewel-bilee gem. Freddie gives Mal a gift.

programme.title: Descendants
programme.desc: Modern-day coming-of-age adventure about the teenage sons and daughters of Disney's most infamous villains fuses castles with classrooms to create a contemporary, music-driven story.

programme.title: Zombies: Addison's Monster Mystery
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Vampire...again.'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: Zombies: Addison's Monster Mystery
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Monsterous News'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: Zombies: Addison's Monster Mystery
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Spooky Stones'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E42 - Lily's Mom Has Got It Goin' On'. Lilly's mum has a date with Hannah's dad. The girls are determined the date will be a success but it doesn't go well after Lilly's mum insists on paying half.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E43 - Me and Mr Jonas and Mr Jonas and Mr Jonas'. American teen heartthrobs The Jonas Brothers star in this episode. Miley gets jealous when her Dad jams with them. Jackson tries to break the world pogo stick record.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - The Way We Almost Weren't'. Miley's on tour but wants to rush home to see Maroon 5. Dad persuades her to stop at the diner where he met her mum, and lightning causes her to dream about the meeting.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E78 - Say Yes to the Protest'. Nia wants to take part in a downtown protest but Raven is set against it, mainly due to the unpredictable nature of protests and potentially dangerous situations.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S4/E79 - Saved by the Belle'. As part of his mission to win the superlative 'Freshest' four years in a row, Booker desperately needs to win the coveted Freshest Freshman to solidify his legend.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S5/E81 - Wrong Victor, the'. When Raven's father, Victor, has a health scare, Raven and Booker return to San Francisco to help. Booker fails to babysit his cousin and must fix things before Raven finds out.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Long Time Gone'. Griffin and Harper sneak back through the portal to find a search party looking for Savannah. Police officers begin questioning and zero in on Griffin and Harper!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - If I Could Turn Back Time'. Griffin and Harper realize that Savannah could have found the portal and travelled back in time too. Together, they go back in time another 30 years to 1960!

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Savannah's ghost uses the old radio in the hidden room to reach out to Griffin and Harper.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Weaving Bad'. Tara accidentally ripped the tapestry when she rescued Bella. Now Cotton Lively, a trainee Everine from the 17th century who has a nasty disease, has escaped through the rip.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Night of the Stench'. It's the Night of the Stench, when the bog turns against the village. Tara asks the tapestry what her future holds, and is horrified when it predicts Cameron's doom.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Art Thief'. Binny's school class takes a field trip to the museum. Suddenly, a security alarm sounds: the valuable Czar jewels have disappeared. Binny and Melchior start investigating...

programme.title: Haunted Towns

programme.title: Kindred Spirits

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle

programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Lady Godiva'. Don Wildman treks to the UK to visit a statue honouring bare-cheeked bravery. He also visits a Brooklyn cemetery to investigate the death of a psychic.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S23/E5 - Cosmic Collision'. Don Wildman investigates a haunted hotel that inspired a bestselling book, a strange green orb at a football game and the most famous ear in history.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: It's early evening in rural Pennsylvania when several dozen witnesses report seeing a fiery object falling through the sky and landing in a nearby woods.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Secrets of Mount Hayes'. Experts investigate reports of a secret alien base deep inside Alaska's highest mountain. Video evidence suggests extra-terrestrial activity in Fairbanks.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Alaskan Bigfoot'. A cryptozoologist hunts for scientific proof of Bigfoot in the remote Alaskan wilderness. Experts investigate a mysterious vortex of energy linked to disappearances.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Missing Douglas'. Experts examine whether an interdimensional portal in the Alaska Triangle led to the disappearance of an aeroplane carrying 44 military personnel in 1950.

programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Alaskan Loch Ness Monster'. A cryptozoologist investigates reports of a sea monster in Alaska. He reviews eyewitness accounts and examines never-before-seen video evidence.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold

programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - The Rise And Fall Of The Ruby Empire'. The team are pulling out rubies by the scores. But with low food supply and bad weather, the team has to muster its strength to finish the job.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - The Gold Rush'. Forced to leave their precious Ruby deposit before Greenland devours them, the miners execute phase two of their operation within the few weeks they have left.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Alien Flight Plan'. A bush pilot witnesses unsettling UFO activity. A former government operative reveals top-secret coordinates to an alleged alien base.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Night Stalkers'. An extra-terrestrial stalker leaves a family frozen in fear outside of Juneau, Alaska.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Captured'. A picturesque rainbow camouflages an extra-terrestrial teleportation device.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Mother Ship'. UFOs circle a larger, egg-shaped mother ship floating high above Anchorage.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Civil War'. Throughout the American civil war, victory on the battlefield was often decided not by strategy and bravery alone, but also by secret information coming from the shadows.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Human Sacrifice In The Sky'. The mummies of three Incan children are discovered in the Andes at a notorious UFO hotspot. Ramy examines why they trekked 1,000 miles to their death.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Stolen Fortune Of The Pirate Mummy'. A mummy recovered at the bottom of the Atlantic has led treasure hunters to $120 million in gold and jewels stolen by infamous pirate Black Sam.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Legend Of The Crystal Skull'. Josh Gates takes on Central America's jungles to investigate the crystal skull discovered by an adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Lost Gold Of Scotland'. Josh Gates heads to the Scottish Highlands. His search focuses on a huge gold reserve hidden after the Jacobite uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E4'. Josh searches a precious statuette that has been lost for 25 years, the Golden Owl. A book of riddles gives cryptic clues to where it might be hidden.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Ghost Ship Of The Great Lakes'. Josh tackles the maritime mystery of the Griffon, the first ship to be lost in the Great Lakes. Josh uses a state-of-the-art submersible in the search.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Party With The Animals'. The Osbournes are baffled by clips of a ghostly pooch, a doughnut-shaped UFO, a Bigfoot encounter on Christmas and some demonic digging.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Dancing In The Lunar Lights'. The Osbournes watch evidence of ghostly children and alien activity. Plus, they slap on their tinfoil hats for a lunar conspiracy theory.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Ozark Howler'. Recently disclosed audio recordings and astonishing photographs may provide the most conclusive evidence to date that the Ozark Howler may have demonic origins.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Old Cambria Jail'. The Cambria County Jail in Pennsylvania housed the area's worst criminals - and executions took place there in its early days. Nick and Katrina examine its hauntings.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Scutt Mansion'. After the owner's tragic death, a Victorian mansion is said to curse all who inhabit it. As Nick and Katrina stay at Illinois' most haunted house, do they risk danger?

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - The Dark Pyramid'. A secret government facility in the wilderness may be hiding an extra-terrestrial pyramid. And, are strange forces in the Triangle making wildlife more aggressive?

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Bigfoot Island'. Is a Sasquatch colony terrorising the residents of a remote island? And, could decades of UFO sightings suggest that aliens are working with the US military?
